items.name: Keychron V1
items.description: 75% wired board with QMK/VIA support, gasket mount, and south-facing RGB. Arguably the best budget enthusiast board on the market.

items.name: Keychron K2 Pro
items.description: 75% wireless hot-swap board with QMK/VIA and Bluetooth 5.1. A top pick for those who want a clean desk without sacrificing customizability.

items.name: Keychron Q1 Pro
items.description: 75% gasket-mount aluminum wireless board. Full QMK/VIA, hot-swap, knob — this is the one people recommend when someone asks for 'the best under $200'.

items.name: GMMK Pro
items.description: 75% gasket-mount aluminum board with a rotary knob and per-key RGB. A modder's favorite — South-facing PCB, hot-swap, and a huge community of mods.

items.name: Keychron K8 Pro
items.description: TKL wireless hot-swap board with QMK/VIA. If you want a tenkeyless with Bluetooth and don't want to spend $200, this is the answer.

items.name: Gateron G Pro 3.0 Yellow
items.description: Factory pre-lubed linear with a 35g actuation. Consistently ranked among the smoothest budget linears available — a go-to first switch for new builders.

items.name: Gateron G Pro 3.0 Red
items.description: Pre-lubed light linear at 45g actuation. Slightly heavier than the Yellow but still buttery smooth — a good pick if you're coming from gaming switches.

items.name: Akko CS Jelly Pink
items.description: 45g linear with a notably smooth factory finish. A sleeper pick at this price — punches well above budget tier in smoothness and sound.

items.name: Kailh Box Brown
items.description: Tactile with an IP56 dust and water resistance rating thanks to the box design. Great all-rounder for people who want feedback without clicky noise.

items.name: Akko Ocean Star Keycaps
items.description: Blue and white ASA-profile PBT doubleshot set. One of the most photographed keycap sets in the community at this price — looks twice what it costs.

items.name: HyperX Pudding Keycaps
items.description: OEM-profile doubleshot PBT with translucent sides for RGB diffusion. The best RGB keycap set on Amazon by a wide margin — high legends, decent texture.

items.name: Glorious GPBT Keycaps
items.description: Cherry-profile 114-key PBT doubleshot set. Sharp legends, solid thock, multiple colorways. The step-up pick when you're ready to go beyond budget caps.
